# OpenCode Behavior Ledger (237 Items)

This document tracks all 237 legacy OpenCode behavior items and their migration decisions, ownership in the new `next/` architecture, and status.

## Summary by Category

| Category | Description | Decision Summary | Total Items |
| -------- | ----------- | ---------------- | ----------- |
| **BOOT** | Host & Plugin Bootstrap | Keep | 10 |
| **SCHEMA** | Tool Schemas & Catalog | Keep | 9 |
| **PERM** | Tool Permissions | Keep | 5 |
| **FILE** | File Tool Operations | Keep | 13 |
| **EXEC** | Command & Process Execution | Keep | 13 |
| **WEB** | Search, Fetch & Browser Tools | Keep | 12 |
| **COMP** | Message Transforms & Compaction | Keep | 12 |
| **CONC** | Session Concurrency & Isolation | Keep (Delete old framework) | 12 |
| **PTY** | Terminal & PTY Operations | Keep | 11 |
| **MSG** | OpenCode Message Codec | Keep | 10 |
| **FUZZY** | Fuzzy Find & Grep Tools | Keep | 10 |
| **CONT** | Session Continuations | Replace (Session Flow + PromptProtocol) | 10 |
| **FB** | Fallback & Retry Chains | Replace (Tail-recursive Fallback) | 24 |
| **REV** | Code Review Loop | Keep | 20 |
| **SUB** | Subagents & Child Sessions | Replace (Child.fs) | 15 |
| **NUDGE** | Work Continuation & Nudge | Replace (Session Flow) | 15 |
| **ES** | Event Sourcing & Journal | Replace (Per-Runtime Journal) | 15 |
| **LIFE** | Session Lifecycle | Keep | 15 |
| **STAB** | Stability Gates & Verification | Keep | 6 |
| **TOTAL** | | | **237** |
